_comment: Drop this file at <project-root>/.claude/workflow-config.json to customize the /research, /plan, /implement trio. All fields are optional — defaults are listed below as comments. Remove the _comment fields before use (or keep them — they're ignored).

test_commands._comment: Project-specific test command strings. Used by /implement for three-tier verification gates and by /plan for §7a Test Inventory. Defaults shown.

skill_tree_paths: _comment: Optional. Directories holding project-specific skill files that /research agents should read.

external_research_domains._comment: Optional. URL prefixes /research Round 2 should prioritize. If absent, agents use generic web search.

codex._comment: Optional. Configuration for the test-criteria-codex skill (Phase 1.5 of /plan). If absent or enabled=false, Phase 1.5 is skipped.

project_protected_files: _comment: Optional. Files that are MUST-NOT-TOUCH for any plan generated against this project. Surfaced in plan §4 CONSTRAINTS and in test-criteria-codex Codex prompt.
